reviews.comment:
Mala atención en los surtidores, y el kiosco le dije que iba a buscar el carnet de socio por el 10 %de descuento y me dijo que ha había hecho el vale y no me podía descontar. Revisen bien las cuentas

(Translated by Google)
Poor service at the pumps, and when I told the kiosk owner I was going to get my membership card for the 10% discount, he said he'd already issued the voucher and couldn't give me the discount. Double-check your accounts.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXak43cEVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es la única estación de servicio de la zona (mar chiquita, mar de Cobo, Santa Clara, etc), siempre está llena de autos sin importar si es temporada o no y sin embargo no invierten en aumentar la cantidad de surtidores y de empleados.

(Translated by Google)
It is the only gas station in the area (Mar Chiquita, Mar de Cobo, Santa Clara, etc.), it is always full of cars regardless of whether it is the season or not, and yet they do not invest in increasing the number of pumps and employees.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/18262014614826625245/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaEx1NWt3RRAB
